name: qa-automation-demoblaze
description: E2E Automation Framework for DemoBlaze using Playwright + TypeScript

scripts.test:demo: npm run allure:clean && playwright test tests/e2e --grep @demo
scripts.test:smoke: npm run allure:clean && playwright test tests/e2e --grep @smoke
scripts.test:regression: npm run allure:clean && playwright test tests/e2e --grep @regression
scripts.test:report: npm run allure:clean; npm run test:regression; npm run allure:serve
